sentences.arabic: صَارَ صُنْعُ الْمُحْتَوَى مِهْنَةً جَدِيدَةً فِي الْعَالَمِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Stvaranje sadržaja postalo je novo zanimanje u modernom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: Content creation has become a new profession in the modern world.

sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ الْمُؤَثِّرُونَ بِمُشَارَكَةِ مَعْلُومَاتٍ مُفِيدَةٍ أَوْ قِصَصٍ مُشَوِّقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Influenseri dijele korisne informacije ili zanimljive priče.
sentences.translationEn: Influencers share useful information or interesting stories.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ هَذَا الْعَمَلُ إِلَى إِبْدَاعٍ وَمَهَارَاتٍ تِقَنِيَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj posao zahtijeva kreativnost i visoke tehničke vještine.
sentences.translationEn: This work requires creativity and high technical skills.
